Complete Study Guide

Series 65 Exam Mastery

45 sections, 4 chapters, interactive flashcards, quizzes, memory aids, and cross-linked concepts — all in one place.

130 Questions on Exam 45 Sections 206 Quizzes 928 Flashcards

📅 Your 20-Day Study Schedule

Exam: April 28, 2026  |  Start: April 3  |  20 study days  |  ~2-3 hours/day recommended

📘 Week 1: April 3–9 — Foundations (Ch 1 & Ch 2 Start)
Day 1 (Apr 3): 1.1–1.3 Economic Concepts & Fed/Fiscal Policy
Day 2 (Apr 4): 1.4–1.5 Financial Reporting & Analytical Methods
Day 3 (Apr 5): 1.6–1.7 Time Value of Money & Risk/Return
Day 4 (Apr 6): 2.1–2.4 Money Market, Bonds, Treasuries, Municipals
Day 5 (Apr 7): 2.5–2.8 Corporate Debt, Equity, Common/Preferred Stock
Day 6 (Apr 8): 2.9–2.12 Options, Derivatives, Investment Companies, ETFs
Day 7 (Apr 9): ⭐ Review Week 1 — Redo all Ch 1 & 2 quizzes, flip all flashcards
📗 Week 2: April 10–16 — Securities & Strategies (Ch 2 Finish & Ch 3)
Day 8 (Apr 10): 2.13–2.16 REITs, Annuities, Insurance, Retirement Plans
Day 9 (Apr 11): 3.1–3.3 Trading Securities, Accounts, Margin
Day 10 (Apr 12): 3.4–3.7 Portfolio Management, Modern Portfolio Theory, Asset Allocation
Day 11 (Apr 13): 3.8–3.10 Tax Considerations, Estate Planning, Trusts
Day 12 (Apr 14): 3.11–3.14 Client Suitability, Performance Measures, Behavioral Finance
Day 13 (Apr 15): ⭐ Review Ch 2 & 3 — Focus on weak areas, redo failed quizzes
Day 14 (Apr 16): ⭐ Comprehensive Review — All flashcards Ch 1-3
📙 Week 3: April 17–22 — Regulation & Ethics (Ch 4 — HEAVILY TESTED)
Day 15 (Apr 17): 4.1–4.2 Federal Securities Acts, SEC Regulations
Day 16 (Apr 18): 4.3–4.4 Investment Advisers Act, Adviser Registration
Day 17 (Apr 19): 4.5–4.6 State Registration, Uniform Securities Act
Day 18 (Apr 20): 4.7–4.8 Ethics, Fiduciary Duty, Business Practices
Day 19 (Apr 21): ⭐ Deep Review Ch 4 — This is ~30% of the exam!
Day 20 (Apr 22): ⭐ Full Review — All chapters, focus on weak spots
🎯 Final Week: April 23–27 — Polish & Confidence
Apr 23–24: Take all quizzes fresh — identify any gaps, review missed questions
Apr 25–26: Focus exclusively on your weakest sections and key numbers/thresholds
Apr 27: Light review only — flashcards, key mnemonics. Get good sleep! 😴
Apr 28: 🏆 EXAM DAY — You've got this, Slade!
💡 Pro Tips: Chapter 4 (Regulation/Ethics) is ~30% of the exam — give it extra time. Use the cross-links to connect concepts across chapters. Aim for 80%+ on quizzes before moving on. Flip every flashcard at least 3 times.
